General.Name: First Tractor Co Ltd
General.Description: First Tractor Company Limited, engages in the manufacturing and sale of agricultural machinery and power machinery. It offers medium and large-sized wheeled and crawler tractors; off-road diesel engines, such as tractors and harvesters, engineering machinery, ships, generator sets, and others; and component products, such as castings and forgings, gears, axles, transmissions, covers, injection pumps, nozzles, and others. The company was formerly known as First Tractor Works of China. First Tractor Company Limited was founded in 1955 and is based in Luoyang, China.
